case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5750 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DESSECKER, JAIME NICOLE ELLIS, EZRA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5750 U.S. CURRENCY;  $321 U.S. CURRENCY; $10,000 U.S. CURRENCY; $978 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PRO PER DESSECKER, JAIME NICOLE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HAGIN, CAROLYN M SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR DESSECKER, JAIME NICOLE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HAGIN, CAROLYN M SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR ELLIS, EZRA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,035.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CAROLYN HAGIN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JAIME NICOLE DESSECKER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,489.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CAROLYN HAGIN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT EZRA ELLIS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,489.00 AND $3,036.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
